failures.name: Existing customer follow-up
failures.summary: The agent captured callback information but did not route to the existing customer path.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not initiate a transfer to the appropriate team.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I had a technician visit three days ago, but the problem came back.
I’m sorry to hear that! I can help you with that. Would you like me to connect you with someone from our team to discuss the issue?
Yes, please. I need to figure out what’s going on.
I can take your details to ensure the right person can assist you. What is your full name?
My name is Alex Johnson.
Great, thanks for that, Alex. What is the best callback number for you?
Perfect, got it. Now, could you please provide the service address?
Sure, it's 123 Maple Street.
Thank you, Alex. Just to confirm, that's 123 Maple Street. Can you also provide the city and ZIP code?
Yes, it's Springfield, ZIP code 12345.
Great, thanks for that. Just to confirm, I have Alex Johnson, callback number 555-123-4567, service address 123 Maple Street, Springfield, ZIP code 12345. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that's correct. Thank you!
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Maintenance request
failures.summary: The agent failed to confirm the service type as part of the information capture.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not capture the service type.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I’d like to schedule annual AC maintenance before summer.
Sure! I can help with that. Can you please tell me your full name?
Sure, it’s Sarah Davis.
Great, thanks for that, Sarah! What is the best callback number for you?
My number is 555-222-1111.
Perfect, got it. That's 555-222-1111, correct?
Yes, that's correct.
Thank you! Now, could you please provide the service address where you'd like the maintenance to be scheduled?
It's 987 Cedar Blvd, Dallas, TX.
I want to be upfront with you — we may not service Dallas, TX. Can I still collect your details, or would you like to check if we can assist?
I’d like to check if you can assist.

Sure! I’ll pass your details to the team for confirmation. Just to recap, I have Sarah Davis, callback number 555-222-1111, and the service address is 987 Cedar Blvd, Dallas, TX. Does that sound right?
Yes, that sounds right.
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

all_results.name: Basic service request
all_results.summary: All expected data points were captured and the transfer was initiated.

all_results.name: Emergency - no heat in winter
all_results.summary: The agent identified the situation as an emergency, offered a live transfer, and handled the urgency appropriately.

all_results.name: Quote request
all_results.summary: The agent successfully routed to the install/quote path, captured the necessary information, did not give a price, and scheduled a callback.

all_results.name: Existing customer follow-up
all_results.summary: The agent captured callback information but did not route to the existing customer path.
all_results.root_cause: The agent did not initiate a transfer to the appropriate team.

all_results.name: FAQ - hours inquiry
all_results.summary: The agent answered the FAQ about business hours without collecting unnecessary lead information.

all_results.name: Request live person immediately
all_results.summary: The agent offered to transfer the caller and handled the transfer failure gracefully with a callback.

all_results.name: AC making strange noise
all_results.summary: All required information was captured, details were confirmed, and a callback was scheduled without treating it as an emergency.

all_results.name: Heating system not working
all_results.summary: The agent assessed urgency, captured information, and initiated a transfer without diagnosing the furnace.

all_results.name: Spam robocall
all_results.summary: The call was routed to a spam path and ended politely.

all_results.name: Wrong number
all_results.summary: The agent clarified the company type, helped redirect the caller, and did not attempt to capture a lead.

all_results.name: Maintenance request
all_results.summary: The agent failed to confirm the service type as part of the information capture.
all_results.root_cause: The agent did not capture the service type.

all_results.name: No cooling with burning smell
all_results.summary: The agent recognized the potential emergency, verified the urgency level, and offered a transfer option.

all_results.name: Callback requested
all_results.summary: The agent successfully captured minimal information, confirmed the callback, and did not pressure for more.

all_results.name: Ductwork cleaning inquiry
all_results.summary: The agent answered the inquiry and captured lead information for follow-up.

all_results.name: End of call - caller decides to wait
all_results.summary: The agent handled the call gracefully, did not pressure the caller, and closed the conversation professionally.
